title: Charybdis numidica
intro: There is no information on Charybdis numidica being a plant. However, Charybdis is the name of a genus of marine heterobranch mollusks, commonly known as false whelks, and Numidica is not a species in this genus.
taxonomy: Charybdis numidica is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Charybdis. The plant is native to Africa. Charybdis numidica is further divided into various subspecies. Charybdis numidica is known to be closely related to other species within the Brassicaceae family.
